description_long: This structure is a modern, open-sided kiosk designed as a carport, featuring a flat, dark-colored roof supported by four sturdy metal columns at each corner. The roof is constructed from what appears to be metal or composite panels, providing full coverage for the vehicles beneath. The kiosk is set on a rectangular paved base made of interlocking stone tiles, offering a stable and durable foundation. The interior is open and spacious, accommodating two cars side by side, with no visible walls or partitions. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a monochromatic color palette dominated by shades of gray and black. There are no visible windows, doors, or signage, emphasizing its utilitarian function as a protective shelter for vehicles.
description: A modern, open-sided carport kiosk with a flat metal roof, supported by four columns and set on a paved stone base, designed to shelter two vehicles.
description_view_0: Front corner view showing the flat roof, two supporting columns, and a single car parked inside.
description_view_1: Direct view of the open side with two cars parked side by side, fully visible under the roof.
description_view_2: Rear corner view highlighting the flat roof, two supporting columns, and a single car parked inside.
description_view_3: Direct view of the open side with two cars parked side by side, showing the front grilles of the vehicles.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof made of metal panels with slight overhangs on all sides, no decorative elements.
